zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Basset於大約1390年出生在英國英格蘭德比夏爾布拉爾斯福德 格林時，她的父親Sir Thomas Basset, Lord of Brailsford41歲，母親Margery Meringe25歲。她於1405年之前與Sir Ralph Shirley在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1419年5月14日之前在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾，埋葬在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Basset于大约1390年出生在英国英格兰德比夏爾布拉爾斯福德 格林时，她的父亲Sir Thomas Basset, Lord of Brailsford41岁，母亲Margery Meringe25岁。她于1405年之前与Sir Ralph Shirley在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1419年5月14日之前在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾，埋葬在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾。

nameMeanings.name: Basset
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: from a diminutive of Old French bas(se) ‘short, of low stature’ (see Bas ).
English: variant of   Bassett  , a cognate of 1 above.
In some cases also an altered form of French Besset (see Bessette 2). Compare Bassette 1.

variants.name: Bas
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Mauricio, Abelardo, Florencio, Francisco, Jorge, Luis, Manuel, Pedro, Soledad, Vicente.  Eastern Slavic Dmytro, Liya, Pyotr, Sergey.
Catalan: habitational name from a place so named in the district of La Garrotxa, Catalonia.
Basque: topographic name for someone who lived by a wood, from baso ‘wood, forest’.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Basset was born about 1390, in Brailsford Green, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Thomas Basset, Lord of Brailsford, was 41 and her mother, Margery Meringe, was 25. She married Sir Ralph Shirley before 1405, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died before 14 May 1419, in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Basset est née environ 1390, à Brailsford Green, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Thomas Basset, Lord of Brailsford, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Margery Meringe, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Ralph Shirley avant 1405, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée avant 14 mai 1419, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Basset um 1390 in Brailsford Green, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Thomas Basset, Lord of Brailsford 41 und ihre Mutter Margery Meringe 25. Sie hat vor 1405 in England, United Kingdom Sir Ralph Shirley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb vor 14. Mai 1419 in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Basset è nata il circa 1390 nel Brailsford Green, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Thomas Basset, Lord of Brailsford, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Margery Meringe, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Sir Ralph Shirley prima del 1405, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì prima del 14 maggio 1419, nel Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolta a Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Bassetが約1390年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアブレイルスフォード グレンで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Basset, Lord of Brailsfordは41歳，母Margery Meringeは25歳であった。1405年以前にイギリスイギリスでSir Ralph Shirleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1419年5月14日以前にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアで死去し，イギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Basset(이)가 대략 1390년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 브레이스퍼드 그린에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas Basset, Lord of Brailsford(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margery Meringe(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1405년 이전 영국 잉글랜드에서 Sir Ralph Shirley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1419년 5월 14일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Basset nasceu aproximadamente 1390, em Brailsford Green, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Thomas Basset, Lord of Brailsford, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Margery Meringe, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Ralph Shirley antes 1405, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu antes 14 de maio de 1419, em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultada em Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Basset родилась около 1390 г. в местности бреилсфорд грин, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas Basset, Lord of Brailsford было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Margery Meringe, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Ralph Shirley перед 1405 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла перед 14 май 1419 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.
